title: Art Yard Sale
description: The Art Yard Sale is a yearly event at the Brighton Fringe Festival, showcasing the work of up to 30 of the best contemporary artists. Expect live art demonstrations, limited edition prints, and original works available for purchase. It's a unique opportunity to buy art directly from your favourite artists and discover something special that you'll treasure forever. On the day, there will be exclusive works and limited editions available at special prices.
